name: Christmas Ginger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, ginger, clove, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat together the Crisco, molasses, brown sugar, water, egg, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until a soft dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into four portions. Shape each portion into a 1-inch thick round on a lightly floured surface.
5. Wrap the shaped rounds in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or up to 1 week.
6. When ready to bake, roll out the chilled dough to 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface.
7. Use gingerbread cutters to cut out shapes and transfer them to ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Allow the cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet, then transfer them to wire racks to cool completely.
10. Decorate with Royal Icing.
